questions.stem_en: If 5x + 3 = 18, what is the value of x?
questions.stem_hi: यदि 5x + 3 = 18 हो, तो x का मान क्या है?
questions.explanation_method_en: Subtract 3 from both sides: 5x = 15. Divide both sides by 5: x = 3.
questions.explanation_concept_en: A linear equation in one variable is solved by isolating the variable. Add/subtract to remove constants, then divide by the coefficient. Here we get 5x = 15, hence x = 3.
questions.explanation_method_hi: दोनों ओर से 3 घटाएँ: 5x = 15। दोनों ओर को 5 से भाग दें: x = 3।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: एक चर वाला linear equation variable को isolate करके हल होता है। पहले constants हटाएँ (add/subtract), फिर coefficient से divide करें। यहाँ 5x = 15 मिलता है, अतः x = 3।
